item.description:
What's New in DockFlow 1.68

New Features

  • ExtraDock Only Mode – Switch between Extra docks setup presets directly from DockFlow, without needing to open ExtraDock separately.
  • IDE Project Picker – IDE actions now let you pick Xcode projects, workspaces, and VS Code workspaces for a more streamlined development workflow.

Major Improvements

  • Light Mode Visual Refresh – Light mode has received a full visual refresh for a cleaner, more polished appearance.

Minor Improvements

  • Renamed: Custom Spacer – "Custom Space" has been renamed to "Custom Spacer" for clarity.

Thank you for your continued support and feedback!
